title: Sports
description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Sports, skipping any feeds with errors.

items.title: Trey Kaufman-Renn Helps No. 7 Purdue Rout Rival Indiana, 93-64
items.description: Trey Kaufman-Renn scored 20 points and Braden Smith added 15 points and eight assists, helping No. 7 Purdue rout rival Indiana 93-64.

items.title: Pittsburgh Pirates Legend, MLB Hall of Famer Bill Mazeroski Dies at 89
items.description: Pittsburgh Pirates legend and Hall of Fame second baseman Bill Mazeroski has died at the age of 89.

items.title: College Football Offseason Buzz: Tennessee QB Joey Aguilar Denied 6th Season
items.description: The college football news cycle never stops. With that in mind, here's a tracker of offseason buzz across the sport.

items.title: Seahawks Star Jaxon Smith-Njigba: 'I Deserve to be Highest-Paid Wide Receiver'
items.description: Seattle Seahawks wide receiver Jaxon Smith-Njigba made his case for why he should be the highest-paid wide receiver in the NFL.

items.title: Men's College Basketball 2025-26 Undefeated Teams Tracker: Miami (OH) is 27-0
items.description: Only one men's college basketball team remains undefeated in the 2025-2026 season.

items.title: Michigan rode a supersized frontcourt to No. 1 -- now it hopes a title is next
items.description: Starting lineups featuring three former centers? How Dusty May and the Wolverines cracked a winning code.

items.title: 2026 Winter Olympics: U.S. women's curling goes for bronze, Eileen Gu competes in halfpipe and more

items.title: Top 50 USMNT players of 2026, ranked by club form: Which Americans made the top 10?
